description: Creation-pricing-lock (D-GH31) fixture: a one-shot import/creation burst (e.g. a future CharGen-style export) whose total (80 AP filler + 2 traits) exceeds DATA.level1AP (50), with every buy event tagged noLock:true. Asserts noLock correctly exempts the whole burst from the automatic threshold — BOTH 'Halfling: Brave' and 'Halfling: Naturally Stealthy' price at their flat creation rates (2 and 4), not the locked tier-2 rates (4 and 7), despite total burst spend (86) being well above the anchor.
